---
title: "My presentation"
author: my name
date: today
theme: solarized
---

```{r}
library(DeclareDesign)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Introduction

My question

1. this
2. that


## My design

* M: I work with a population of XX with features Z
* I: I want to know XX
* D: I assign treatment Z and gather measure M
* A: I use differences in means

## Implementation

Key challenges:

1.
2.

## My data

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| out-width: '60%'


df <- read.csv("data.csv")

hist(df$Y)
  
```


## My analysis {.smaller}

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| results: 'asis'

model <- lm_robust(Y ~ X, data = df)

texreg::htmlreg(model) 
  
```


## Conclusions

* Good stuff
* More good stuff
